query: Find Guidehouse.com pages that mention GSA or General Services Administration or GSA schedules/vehicles (Alliant 2, OASIS, MAS). Provide exact quoted language and URLs.
answer:
### GSA Schedules / MAS Pages

- **https://guidehouse.com/government-contract-vehicles/gsa-schedules**  
  Exact quotes: "Agencies may access Guidehouse through the following **GSA Schedule** contracts." [1]  
  "**Guidehouse Contract Number: 47QTCA18D005G**" (lists multiple SINs including 54151S – Information Technology Professional Services). [1]  
  "**Guidehouse Digital LLC Contract Number: 47QTCA19D00GU**" (Period of Performance: Through August 6, 2029). [1]  
  "**Guidehouse Digital LLC Contract Number: GS-35F-0373X** Period of Performance: Through May 5, 2011-May 4, 2026 (options to May 4, 2031) **MAS Pricelist** Special Item Numbers (SINs): - 54151HEAL: Health Information Technology Services - 54151S: Information Technology Professional Services". [1]

- **https://guidehouse.com/-/media/www/site/corporate/assets/gs00f045da-mas-pss-pricelist-ps-0027.pdf**  
  Exact quotes: "**Multiple Award Schedule (MAS)** - Guidehouse The INTERNET address for **GSA Advantage!™** is: GSAAdvantage.gov." [4]  
  "**Authorized Federal Supply Schedule Price List | Federal Supply Group: Professional Services **General Services Administration (GSA) Multiple Award Schedule (MAS)** | Contract GS-00F-045DA**". [4]

### Alliant 2 Pages

- **https://guidehouse.com/government-contract-vehicles/gsa-alliant-2**  
  Exact quotes: "**GSA Alliant 2** Alliant 2, **GSA's** premier enterprise GWAC, provides flexible access to customized IT solutions from a large, diverse pool of industry partners." [3]  
  "With **GSA’s Alliant 2 Contract**, government agencies can obtain a single source of integrated IT services...". [3]

### General Services Administration (GSA) Mentions (Non-Schedule Specific)

- **https://guidehouse.com/news/communities-energy-infrastructure/2020/guidehouse-to-support-gsa-advanced-fleet-platform**  
  Exact quote: "Guidehouse to Support **General Services Administration** in ... modernize the US **General Services Administration (GSA)** Advanced Fleet Platform (AFP)." [2]

- **https://guidehouse.com/government-contract-vehicles/hcats**  
  Exact quotes: "HCaTS is a ten-year, multiple award... contract administered by the **General Services Administration (GSA)**, in partnership with the Office of Personnel Management (OPM)." [5] (repeated in Contract Scope section). [5]

- **https://guidehouse.com/news/communities-energy-infrastructure/2021/guidehouse-to-support-gsa-in-fleet-electrification**  
  Exact quote: "Guidehouse... has been selected by the U.S. **General Services Administration** Office of Fleet Management (**GSA Fleet**) to support federal offices and agencies in electrifying the US government’s fleet." [7]

- **https://guidehouse.com/case-studies/technology-solutions/machine-learning-to-predict-government-fraud**  
  Exact quote: "Guidehouse has been working with **GSA**, building dashboards that compare and explore spending profiles...". [9]

No Guidehouse.com pages in results explicitly mention OASIS. External GSA/USAspending links (e.g., [6], [10]) confirm contracts but are not Guidehouse.com-hosted. [6][10]
